name_en: 🔥 Mini Soft Calfskin Pebble Bucket Bag Pebble 👜 Merges pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design style 💄 creating a unique innovative handbag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and practical functions 👄 adjustable shoulder strap length and suitable for multiple carrying ways, the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. 👛 This mini version is made of soft calfskin. 😻 Crossbody, shoulder or handheld *Adjustable detachable shoulder strap* Magnetic snap closure *Interior pocket* Synthetic leather lining* 🔥 Anagram engraved pebble 💥
name_cn:

Style No.: 9047

Size: 20CM~16CM~16CM
